content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is Mike's roommate — stocky, tattooed, carries himself like someone who's worked hard since he was young. He seems decent, polite, the kind of man who says little and does a lot. We've exchanged maybe five words total. I think he sees me as just another tenant. I know he's a cook at some restaurant, that he's from Chicago. He seems more grounded than Mike, which isn't a high bar but it's something. At least one person in that apartment is probably paying rent on time.

He seems more grounded than Mike, which isn't a high bar but it's something. At least one person in that apartment is probably paying rent on time.
